since_last: 33% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.14%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.32% · BTC -1.36% · Gold +0.44% · Nasdaq100 -1.58%. 33% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.14%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.14%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at -9.64%
cards.body: Leaders: WDAY +4.16%, NET +3.55%, SAP +2.56%, NOW +2.50%, CRM +2.01%. Laggards: AMAT -9.64%, TER -9.12%, AMBA -8.70%, INTC -8.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.83% at $152.66
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.83% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
